title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A DISTRICT OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) IN THE CITY OF GENERAL TRIAS, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
Daily Tribune, May 26, 2022; 118 OG No. 22, 6361 (May 30, 2022)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11769, May 24, 2022 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A DISTRICT OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) IN THE CITY OF GENERAL TRIAS, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

A district office of the Land Transportation Office (LTO) is hereby established in the City of General Trias, Province of Cavite.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Transportation shall immediately include in the Department's programs the operationalization of the LTO district office in the City of General Trias, Province of Cavite, the funding of which shall be included in the General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3.

This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

LORD ALLAN JAY Q. VELASCO

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on May 25, 2021 and January 31, 2022

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

MARK LLANDRO L. MENDOZA

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

MAY 24 2022

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
